data.chapter_title_en: supplications for when you wake up
data.arabic_text: (.الْحَمْدُ للَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا، وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ )
data.english_text: (All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us and unto Him is the resurrection.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Alhamdu lillahil-lathee ahyana baAAda ma amatana wa-ilayhin-nushoor.)
